feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: AI Engineering
entry.content:
In today's fast paced world, Artificial Engineering has become an important part in our daily life, in all possible manner. I learned about different AI tools like, prompt engineering, fine tuning, lang chain, Dall-E, probabilistic and deterministic approach. I learned about chatgpt versions like chatgpt3 and chatgpt4.  

Based on time spend on any page, it gives you specific solutions. We can get answers to any kind of information that is needed in dept as well as in simple language.

Dall-E is a text to image generator which is a new ability recently upgraded by chatgpt. We can give simple statements like, picture of a dog walking in a park, and AI will give us the appropriate picture. But to keep in mind, this feature is not available in all chatgpt versions. It is a very useful model in creating creative art via AI.

I learned about Lang chain model which provides developers with different language model and you can easily check your codes with large lines for errors and how to rectify those. A lot of applications can be developed using long chain framework.

If you have already searched something in chatgpt before and come back to look for the same result, then this result is already stored in the background which is known as feature store. It is a very useful feature in AI engineering. Based on our previous inputs, it will give us the output.

I had recently send a mail to my organization but I was not very confident of the language or format used in the mail. But now that I have knowledge of chatgpt and it’s features, I am very sure that the same mail I would be able to write in a much better manner.

Deterministic approach is basically on an idea that is generally true or an event that is supposed to happen. Like address or email address, or after 99 it’s 100 and not something else.

Whereas Probabilistic approach is based on probability. It can be less precise as well. For example: Weather forecasting. Uses past conditions and probability to determine a value.

In spite of all these features, there are some limitations as well in chatgpt. There is a chance of getting outdated data in some cases, biased answers and lack of common sense sometimes. For example: if we ask chatgpt who is the winner of ICC Men’s World cup 2023, then it would not be able to give us the correct answer, specially if we are using chatgpt3.5.

Apart from this, with the help of new features like deterministic approach and probabilistic approach, Lang Chain, Dall-E etc it has become an useful tool in daily activities.

In conclusion, I can say that this module has up skilled my knowledge on chatgpt or AI engineering which I can use on daily basis to make every day work easier. In future also, I will keep using all these features as and when required.

AI has it's pros and cons as per understanding, we need to use it based on our requirement but make sure not to trust it blindly.

entry.title: Not able to locate saved data in custom table of SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,
I am referring to below link to uploaded data from excel and save it to custom table which is created in SAP S4 public cloud.


https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/easily-upload-data-from-excel-to-database-table-using-rap-model/qaq-p/13654927

back  end manage :

managed implementation in class ZBP_R_CPR_ITEM_DB_01 unique;

strict ( 2 ) ;

define behavior for ZR_CPR_ITEM_DB_01 alias AMD_ID//upload // amd_id

persistent table zcpr_item_db_01

etag master LocalLastChangedAt //comment

lock master

early numbering

authorization master( global )

{

determination AmmendamentID on save {create;}

field ( readonly )

Cputm,

Cpudt,

Cngtm,

Chuser,

LocalLastChangedAt;

 

field ( readonly ) //: update )

AmdID;

 

create;

update;

delete;

mapping for ZCPR_ITEM_DB_01

{

AmdID = amdid;

Amdno = amdno;

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

}

Front End :

 

onUpdatePriceButton: function(AmdID) {
debugger;
var oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel();

//all excel file data
var items = this.getView().getModel("localModel").getData().items;

var indices = this.byId("ExcellUploadTable").getSelectedIndices();



for (var i = 0; i < indices.length; i++) {
// var obj = items[i];
var obj = items[indices[i]];
var oldfr = this.onDateConvert(obj['Old From']);
var Enddate = this.onDateConvert( obj['End Date']);
var engdt = this.onDateConvert(obj['Entered at']);
var ExcellpayLoad={
"AmdID": parseInt(Math.random()*1000).toString(),
//"AmdID": obj['POAM ID'],
"Amdno": obj['POAM No'] ,
"Lifnr": obj['Vendor'],
"Bstnk": obj['PO Number'],
"Posex" : obj['item'] ,
.

.

.

.

.

.


};

var that =this;
this.oModel.create("/ZCPR_UPLOAD", ExcellpayLoad, {
success: function(response) {
sap.m.MessageToast.show("Excell File Data Saved Successfully.");
},
error: function(error) {
sap.m.MessageToast.show("Failed to save Excell Fil Data.");
}
});

}


I have already created oData and published it. The oData is being consumed from Fiori application. The Fiori application is uploading excel sheet properly and seems like saving data.
I have created another oData to fetch the table content. The same is again used in Fiori application for consumption. The fiori application is displaying data properly.
However, in Eclipse ADT when CDS view is created on the same table to check if the data is saved or not. It's not reflecting.
I am confused, from where the data is stored.
Your help is appreciated.
Regards,
Rutuja.

entry.title: why cant I use BASE while declaring table inline?
entry.content:
hello experts,

here lt_schdx will only have only line because every time a new line is added, old ones are removed.
if I had table declared beforehand I could use BASE but it's not allowed here.
any alternative because BASE statement is not allowed, my code below:

LOOP AT lt_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_item>).

DATA(lt_schdx) =
VALUE cod_t_bapischdlx( ( updateflag = 'I'
          itm_number = COND #( WHEN <ls_item>-posnr IS NOT INITIAL THEN 'X' )
          sched_line = '0001'
          req_date   = COND #( WHEN <ls_item>-edatu IS NOT INITIAL THEN 'X' )
          date_type  = 'X'
          req_qty    = 'X' ) ).

ENDLOOP.

entry.title: MDG ATC - ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT errors
entry.content:
Dear All ,


When we do ATC checks on MDG Enhancements using ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT  variant  ,we get lot of errors "Usage of not released application API " although we are using standard MDG API methods . Does any faced this problem ? Is SAP planning to release new APIs in place of existing ones to reslove these errors in future ?

Kindly share your experiences if you have come up with such problems in the past or how to resolve these errors ?

entry.title: Any BADI on MIGO GR?
entry.content:
Hello,
Our Incoming MIRO Invoice is blocking for Payment because of the No GR, well, so once user posted GR in MIGO the Qty. block (RSEG-SPGRM) got removing, fine, but we want to do some custom coding before / immediately after SAP removes the the Qty. block on MIRO invoice, pls. let us know any BADI / ENH or exit wherein we can put our Z code just before/after the qty. block got removal logic

Thx

entry.title: ISSUE : BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE adding new item
entry.content:
I trying to add new batch split using BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE ( T-code VL02N)
Its urgent . Please help me on this 

Getting this error : Essential transfer parameters are missing in record: 000001 .


Here is my code :



Regards ,
Vasanth

entry.title: QR Code issue if Invoice has multiple Pages
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I have Created a QR Code and attached in SAP Script. Now it is working properly when the invoice has one page. But if invoice line items flows two second page the Qr Code is not Getting Printed in SAP SAcript.

 

If anybody faced this issue can suggest me a solution

 

Regards,

Mantri Shekar.

entry.title: DEBUG Custom logic S4HANA CLOUD
entry.content: I just wanted to understand in S4HANA Cloud public edition , if I need to debug the logic written inside BADI within CUSTOM LOGIC app. How could I perform ? Also i don't have ADT luxury.

entry.title: sap abap email functionality using classes issue with html table
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I have to send email via program . When I created the body of the email without containing any variable but only text, there is no issue in it. But when I wants to get variable values inside table it is not taking the values.

it_email_body[] = VALUE #( ( line = '<html><body>' )
                           ( line = 'Date:'  )   "how to use sy-datum here.
                            ( line = '<br>')
                            ( line = 'Subject: Revalidate request' ) ( line = '<br>')
  ( line = 'QA/ QC Team.' ) ( line = '<br>')
  ( line = 'Refer to below details of material expiring/ expired. You are requested to kindly review and re-validate the same.' )

   ( line = '<br>')
   ( line = '<table style="font-family:calibri;font-size:15;MARGIN:10px;"' )
   ( line = 'cellspacing="0" cellpadding="1" width="75%" ')
   ( line =  'border="1"><tbody><tr>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Sr. No.</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Material Description</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Material code</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Expired / Expiring on</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Batch No.</th>' )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-matnr '</td>' )  "facing issue at this line for creating second  row for values to  the table from the worarea WA-matnr wa-batch .
( line = '<tr><td>' wa-  '</td></tr>' )
   ( line =   )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-charg 
*   ( line =  '</td>' )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-vfdat 
*   ( line = '</td>' )

  ( line = '</html></body>' )

 ( line = 'Post validation, kindly share the re-validated/ validity extension certificate for updates and records.' )

This is not working.

it_email_body TYPE bcsy_text,  as per the c ode

note : My aim here is to get html table to be added to program with  email functionality.
 ( line = 'Regards' )
 ( line = 'Stores Team.' ) ).

entry.title: HANA instance access within steampunk instance for "SAP HANA smart data access connections"
entry.content:
Team,

I was trying to explore " SAP HANA smart data access connections based on ODBC" . My question is can i create virtual table within the HANA instance of a steampunk instance. My intension is to access remote tables from steampunk. First of all , do partners and developers have access to HANA instance of steampunk.

 


Regards,
Vishnu

entry.title: BRF+ in S/4 HANA Public Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Public Cloud Experts, 

We have developed multiple BRF+ applications in our current On-Premise Landscape for forms and other custom RAP applications . Now we are looking at moving some of our custom to Cloud . When we build Custom BRF+ applications using the BRF+ application in the starter tenant and when i try to call the BRF+ application using the class cl_fdt_function_process class the get the error that the class is not permitted in the cloud .

Can you anyone guide me how to access BRF+ applications from Public cloud Developer Extensionsibilty ?

 

Thanks,

Vijaya

entry.title: Mutiple Warning message for field check
entry.content:
Hello All,

Reference to subjected issue we need your expertise help, for our client at outbound delivery we already have implemented custom logic for check custom field and selected as an "I' information if field is missing before saving the delivery at both create and change mode and it's working perfectly fine.

For fulfill our client requirement we need to implement one more custom logic in same outbound delivery business Badi but after implementing we are able see only one error message at one time. if both fields also missing system showing only one error.

So is there any code logic available so we able see both missing field error and warning message same time that we implemented in business logic  

Please share your input it will really be helpful for us. 

Thanks 

Samadhan

entry.title: Create a background in ABAP Cloud enivornment
entry.content:
Dear All ,

I want to schedule a process to run in background after the SAVE action . I am thinking to trigger a event after save action and then run my process in event handler class .

Apart for this is there any way I can schedule the process in job and submit job after save action ?

entry.title: migrate data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public), suggestion?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,
Is there any possible way to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public)? Could you please suggest the possible methods?

entry.title: Req to create 2 sales order using bapi with the data from JSON payload by using SAP odata GW
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to create multiple sales orders using a BAPI in SAP using sap gateway call.I am getting data in deep entity format(JSON FILE).Kindly suggest me which method i can enhance so that i read the payload data in DPC ext class

entry.title: I want to select all entries coming in my RAP application.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating a GSTR1 report by using RAP in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud, 

My application is working fine but when I am clicking on select all button to send the data to another portal then only initial entries( ex- 120 entries got selected ) are got selected only, but in my application i have 600+ entries.

I want to select all the coming entries in my GSTR1 application.

Please suggest how to acheive the same.

Thanks for your support.

 

SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model RISE with SAP SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility

entry.title: I want to Export/download all the data of my GSTR1 RAP application in Excel sheet.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating a GSTR1 report by using RAP in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud, 

My application is working fine but when I am exporting my data into Excel then I will get the exact count of lines.

But the data is not exported correctly in excel, because when I am trying to filter my excel with a particular invoice then the data is not available in excel for the same invoice 

but I have the same data in my GSTR1 application.

I am using RAP's standard export functionality( which is coming by default in RAP ) for the same.

Thanks for your support.

entry.title: standard LIKP table not getting activated after append structure and doing se14
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am badly in need of help as client is waiting to move the tr into production. Plz help me with this issue.

 


I have added new field to the exising append structure zzlikp_append as per the business requirement to the standard table likp.
I have done se14 adjust and activate. 

The thing is that it is not throwing any error it is just processing. I would like to know how much time it will take to process 25000 records in my sandbox. it is more than 2 hours. 

I also faced one dump of 

TYPELOAD_NEW_VERSION”

which is not getting now. Neither it is showing any error. 

The only page in front of me is 

Is there any way to know how much time it will complete ?
or should I have to do anything to fix this issue ?

entry.title: What is the Better way for developing Reports in SAP S/4 Hana private Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition implementation, it would be grateful  if you could suggest what is the better way for developing Reports in Private Edition?

Whether we need to develop in ALV Reports in SE38 or any other feasible way for developing in Private edition?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to Develop Adobe Forms in SAP S/4 Private Edition like Public Edition through Binding Fields?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

Is it feasible to develop Adobe forms in SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition through Binding Fields(XML) similar to how we do in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps needs to be followed for development of Adobe Forms in Private Edition.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav
